// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text.Json;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using Ryn.Ipc;

namespace TestApp;

file sealed class DataCommandsRouter : ICommandRouter
{
    public bool CanRoute(string command) => command is "processData";

    public async ValueTask<string> RouteAsync(
        string command, ReadOnlyMemory<byte> args, IServiceProvider services, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        switch (command)
        {
            case "processData":
            {
                using var __doc = JsonDocument.Parse(args);
                var __root = __doc.RootElement;
                var __has0 = __root.TryGetProperty("name", out var __prop0);
                if (!__has0)
                    throw new RynIpcArgumentException("processData", "name", "required argument is missing");
                if (__prop0.ValueKind == System.Text.Json.JsonValueKind.Null)
                    throw new RynIpcArgumentException("processData", "name", "argument must not be null");
                var __p0 = __prop0.GetString()!;
                var __has1 = __root.TryGetProperty("data", out var __prop1);
                if (!__has1)
                    throw new RynIpcArgumentException("processData", "data", "required argument is missing");
                var __p1 = __prop1;
                var __result = global::TestApp.DataCommands.ProcessData(__p0, __p1);
                return __ToJson(__result);
            }
            default:
                throw new RynCommandNotFoundException(command);
        }
    }

    private static string __ToJson(string? value)
    {
        if (value is null) return "null";
        var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder(value.Length + 2);
        sb.Append('"');
        foreach (var c in value)
        {
            switch (c)
            {
                case '\\': sb.Append("\\\\"); break;
                case '"': sb.Append("\\\""); break;
                case '\n': sb.Append("\\n"); break;
                case '\r': sb.Append("\\r"); break;
                case '\t': sb.Append("\\t"); break;
                case '\b': sb.Append("\\b"); break;
                case '\f': sb.Append("\\f"); break;
                default:
                    if (c < ' ' || c == '\u2028' || c == '\u2029')
                        sb.Append($"\\u{(int)c:X4}");
                    else
                        sb.Append(c);
                    break;
            }
        }
        sb.Append('"');
        return sb.ToString();
    }
}

public static class DataCommandsRynExtensions
{
    public static IServiceCollection AddDataCommands(this IServiceCollection services)
    {
        services.AddSingleton<ICommandRouter, DataCommandsRouter>();
        return services;
    }
}

]
